Title: IonQ achieves 50 algorithmic qubits on Forte Enterprise with published randomized-benchmarking data
Date: 2025-06-15
Source: synthetic_news

IonQ said its Forte Enterprise system reached 50 algorithmic qubits after a new round of randomized-benchmarking tests, giving investors a concrete performance marker rather than a roadmap claim. The company said the data covered multi-qubit circuit depth, two-qubit gate behavior, and application-oriented workloads submitted by early enterprise users.

Management framed the result as a step toward commercial-grade trapped-ion systems, with the benchmark package being shared with prospective government and industrial customers. Analysts noted that the disclosure gives IonQ a near-term proof point against other pure-play quantum names in a market that has been asking for measured hardware progress.
